ogTitle: Edmondson Park vs Edrom: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Edmondson Park and Edrom.
heading: Edmondson Park vs Edrom — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Edmondson Park, New South Wales and Edrom, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Edmondson Park has a lower overall climate risk score (30/100) compared to Edrom (42/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Edmondson Park or Edrom safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Edmondson Park has a flood risk score of 25/100, while Edrom scores 49/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Edmondson Park scores 19/100 for bushfire risk. Edrom scores 59/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Edmondson Park or Edrom?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Edmondson Park has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.82% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
